= Test fixtures from OASIS DocBook WG

The files in this directory are taken from the OASIS DocBook WG site, available
at: https://docs.oasis-open.org/docbook/

The files included are:

* DocBook XML 5.0 (versions beyond 5.0 are published in Word, with no DocBook XML)
* DocBook Publisher Schema 1.0

== License

Original license as per the OASIS DocBook WG site.
